candidates.name: GitHub PR Review Response Time Tracker
candidates.pitch: Parses GitHub PR page DOM to extract first-review timestamps, stores in localStorage, and shows a badge overlay with avg time-to-review per repo. One engineer can ship this in 3 days. Chrome extension
candidates.pain: Engineering leads lack visibility into which PRs are stuck waiting for review, causing ship velocity surprises.

monetization_hint.model: Freemium → SaaS bridge (paid tier via external Stripe)

candidates.name: LinkedIn Post Optimal Send Time Recommender
candidates.pitch: Parses own post history from LinkedIn profile DOM, cross-references engagement timestamps, builds a simple time-of-day engagement model. No external API needed. Directly helps creators optimize reach.
candidates.pain: LinkedIn creators post at random times and miss peak engagement windows specific to their audience.

candidates.name: PR Code Comment Density Heatmap
candidates.pitch: Parses GitHub PR diff and comment data from DOM, calculates comment density per file, renders a heatmap overlay. Teams use this to guide refactoring decisions. GitHub's PR UI is well-structured for sc
candidates.pain: Teams can't see which files accumulate the most review comments, missing signals about code complexity or documentation gaps.

monetization_hint.model: Freemium → SaaS bridge (paid tier via external Stripe)

candidates.name: Gong Call Silence Segment Detector
candidates.pitch: Uses Gong's transcript API and Web Speech API to identify silence segments >3s and calculates silence ratio per call segment. Builds a timeline overlay on Gong's UI. This is buildable in 2 weeks since
candidates.pain: Sales reps waste time manually reviewing call recordings to find awkward silence moments that hurt deals.

candidates.name: Stripe Customer Lifetime Value Forecaster
candidates.pitch: Queries Stripe API for customer payment history, fits a simple retention curve model, projects LTV. Displays inline on Stripe dashboard. Bridges a real gap since Stripe doesn't provide forward-looking
candidates.pain: Founders and finance leads can't quickly estimate future customer value from Stripe's dashboard, making retention decisions guesswork.

candidates.name: Sales Prospect Funding Event Alert
candidates.pitch: Scrapes Crunchbase and news APIs for portfolio companies, matches against a user-maintained prospect list, fires browser notifications on funding events. Pre-built news APIs reduce complexity signific
candidates.pain: Sales reps miss prime outreach moments when prospects announce funding rounds, losing competitive advantage.

candidates.name: Gong Call Question Pattern Analyzer
candidates.pitch: NLP-classifies questions from Gong transcripts (discovery, objection, commitment, rapport), counts by type, compares to winning call benchmarks. Gong's transcript format is structured enough for patte
candidates.pain: Sales managers can't see what types of questions reps ask during calls, missing coaching opportunities for discovery or objection handling.

candidates.name: Gmail Attachment Size Budget Keeper
candidates.pitch: Monitors compose dialog attachment sizes, compares against recipient provider limits (Gmail 25MB, Outlook 20MB), warns proactively. Uses known provider limits and file size calculations.
candidates.pain: Users hit attachment size limits when sending emails and have to re-compress or resend, wasting time.

candidates.name: Notion Database Cross-Reference Graph
candidates.pitch: Parses Notion page DOM to extract database relations and renders a force-directed graph showing connections. No API needed since Notion web app exposes DOM. Builds on top of existing link detection lo
candidates.pain: Notion power users lose track of which databases reference each other across large workspaces, creating broken links.

monetization_hint.model: Stripe tip jar (Payment Links $3/$5/$10) + optional sponsor link
